# fabbro

> CLI tool for reviewing and annotating LLM-generated code. Structured annotations, local-first, no servers. Written in Go with a TUI interface.

## Documentation

- [CLI Reference](docs/cli.md): All commands and flags
- [TUI Guide](docs/tui.md): Terminal UI navigation and keybindings
- [FEM — Fabbro Extension Model](docs/fem.md): Plugin and extension system
- [Keybindings](docs/keybindings.md): Keyboard shortcut reference

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

Leer en español: https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/
